# வில்லிபாரதம் Daily Reading Blog

Daily deep-reading sessions of **வில்லிபாரதம்** (Villi Bharatam) by Villiputhurar (14th century) — the celebrated Tamil transcreation of the Mahabharata.

Each post covers 5–8 verses with:
- Word-by-word breakdown (சொல்பிரிப்பு)
- Tamil விளக்கம்
- English explanation and literary context

## Structure

```
content/
  posts/          ← Daily MDX session files (YYYY-MM-DD-day-N.mdx)
  pages/          ← Static pages (about, index)
public/           ← Static assets
villi_bharatam_progress.json  ← Reading progress tracker
```

## Generated by

Claude (Cowork mode) — scheduled daily task running automatically each morning.
